title: Key-Takeaway Full Coverage (no gaps, no scope creep)
description: The generated TR doc must teach EVERY key takeaway of the session as per the curriculum, and must NOT introduce scope beyond them.
criterion: Each key takeaway is covered by at least one section/slide; no section teaches material outside the takeaway set.

rubric.5: All takeaways covered with dedicated content; zero scope creep.
rubric.3: All covered but one is thin, or one minor out-of-scope aside.
rubric.1: A takeaway is missing entirely, or a whole section is out of scope.

cases.rationale: 1:1 mapping, all five covered, nothing extra.
'Congestion control' takeaway is missing — must fail (gap).
QUIC/HTTP-3 is out of scope for this session — scope creep, must fail.
